name.en: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI)
name.zh: 印度统计与计划实施部

description.en: The Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI) is the apex body for official statistics in India. It coordinates the Indian Statistical System and publishes a wide range of national statistical products including GDP estimates, Consumer Price Index, industrial production, employment surveys, social statistics, and the National Sample Survey. MoSPI also oversees the Central Statistics Office (CSO) and the National Sample Survey Office (NSSO).
description.zh: 印度统计与计划实施部（MoSPI）是印度官方统计的最高机构，协调印度统计体系，发布广泛的国家统计产品，包括GDP估算、消费者价格指数、工业生产、就业调查、社会统计和国家样本调查。MoSPI还负责监管中央统计局（CSO）和国家样本调查局（NSSO）。

en: National Accounts Statistics (GDP, GVA by sector)
Consumer Price Index (CPI) - Rural, Urban, Combined
National Sample Survey (NSS) - employment, household expenditure
zh: 消费者价格指数（CPI）——农村、城市、综合
国家样本调查（NSS）——就业、家庭支出
社会统计（贫困、教育、卫生指标）
可持续发展目标（SDG）印度指数
